# Beeond

> Beeond is an AI-native, done-for-you marketing and growth agency for B2B,
> SaaS and tech companies. It runs a company's whole digital presence — every
> channel buyers use to find and evaluate vendors — as one coordinated swarm
> of AI agents calibrated and directed by the two founders. Bilingual:
> English and Hebrew authored in parallel at first-language quality.

## What Beeond runs

- GEO / AI-search visibility: be the answer when buyers ask ChatGPT,
  Perplexity or Google AI who to use (the anchor channel)
- SEO content engine: long-form built to rank and be cited by AI, in the
  client's voice
- LinkedIn organic and founder-led content
- Paid campaigns (Google, LinkedIn) run on documented hypotheses
- Email lifecycle, landing pages and CRO
- Digital PR and backlinks; trust, reviews and case studies
- Rank tracking, reporting and brand monitoring

## How it works

Phased onboarding over ~90 days: Foundation (weeks 1–4: audits, tracking,
schema, voice calibration) → Content Engine (weeks 4–8) → Amplification
(weeks 8–12). The foundation is built before channels are lit up.

## Who it's for

B2B and SaaS founders, heads of marketing and heads of growth who need the
breadth of an agency without the agency price, and AI-speed output that
still sounds like them. Not generic — every automated flow is calibrated to
the client's brand before it ships.

## Founders

- Adam — AI systems and agent swarms; built the swarm that runs the channels
- Yarden Morgan — B2B marketing and growth; the standard output is calibrated to

## Status

Pre-launch (trademark clearance in progress). Primary market: Israel + US,
Hebrew + English at parity. Site: https://beeond.ai
